info.title: Kener API v4
info.description:
OpenAPI specification for Kener self-hosted API v4. All endpoints use Bearer authentication unless explicitly public. Example request URL: GET https://your-kener.com/api/v4/pages

New in v4.1.0: Authentication configuration (OIDC, LDAP) stored under site config keys "auth.oidc" and "auth.ldap".

New in v4.2.0: Triggers, Alert Configs, Images (full CRUD with upload), and Export/Import endpoints.

serverUrl.description: Base URL for your Kener deployment

get.summary: Get monitor data in a time range
get.description: Returns monitoring data points for [start_ts, end_ts). Timestamps are normalized to minute boundaries.

patch.summary: Bulk update monitor data over a range

get.description:
New config keys in v4.1.0:
- `auth.oidc`: OIDC/OpenID Connect authentication configuration
- `auth.ldap`: LDAP/Active Directory authentication configuration

patch.description: Updates a trigger. The `name` field cannot be changed.

get.summary: List alert configs for a monitor

get.description: Returns image metadata only. The binary data field is never included in list responses.

post.description: Uploads an image or font file. Supported types: image/png, image/jpeg, image/webp, image/heic, image/svg+xml, font/ttf, font/otf, font/woff, font/woff2. Maximum size: 2MB.

get.description: Exports all data as a JSON payload. Use the `scope` parameter to control which data is included.

schema.description: Full export payload. Structure depends on the requested scope.

post.description: Imports data from a payload previously exported via GET /api/v4/export. Existing records are updated; new records are created. Users are imported as inactive (passwords are not exported). Returns 200 (not 201) because the operation performs upserts, not pure creation.

schema.description: Full export payload as returned by GET /api/v4/export

page_path.description: Will be sanitized to lowercase kebab-like single segment

monitor_tags.description: Monitor tags this alert config applies to. Populated from the URL path on create.

imported.description: Counts of imported items per resource type
